texto: I've been trying to learn how to not be so conflicted about things like my own anger. I've always had a place in my music for my anger as a way of compensating for not having a mechanism to express it in my everyday life. So I've been trying to be more true to myself, and that helps me to chill out a little bit. But politically, uh-uh. No.

O trecho “I've been trying to learn how to not be so conflicted about things like my own anger. I've always…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, vida, music pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de music e myself.

texto: Pop stardom is not very compelling. I'm much more interested in a relationship between performer and audience that is of equals. I came up through folk music, and there's no pomp and circumstance to the performance. There's no, like, 'I'll be the rock star, you be the adulating fan.'
